llmld:summary.one_liner: Premium paint, flooring, and renovation services in Fort Lauderdale and Miami.
llmld:summary.paragraph: Danova Renovations delivers designer-grade paint, flooring, and renovation services across Fort Lauderdale and Miami. Interior, exterior, commercial painting, flooring installation, and drywall repair. We serve homeowners and commercial clients across South Florida with interior and exterior painting, flooring installation, popcorn ceiling removal, wallpaper removal, and drywall repair. Licensed, insured, and EPA Lead-Safe certified.
key_facts: Popcorn ceiling removal, wallpaper removal, drywall repair

llmld:pages.title: Danova Renovations | Best Paint & Flooring in Fort Lauderdale & Miami
Our Services
Interior Painting Service | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: Give every space a clean, modern look with our detail-focused interior painting service. From prep to final walkthrough, we protect your space, respect your time, and deliver smooth, long-lasting finishes.

llmld:pages.title: Exterior Painting Service | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: Storm-ready prep, elastomeric caulking, and premium finishes that resist Florida weather. Our exterior painting service ensures your home looks great and stays protected.

llmld:pages.title: Commercial Painting Service | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: After-hours scheduling, dust control, and rapid-cure coatings to minimize downtime. We keep your business running while we transform your space.

llmld:pages.title: Flooring Installation | Hardwood, Tile, Laminate | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: Hardwood, tile, laminate, and luxury vinyl plank—we install it all with precision and care. From removal to finishing, we handle every step.

llmld:pages.title: Popcorn Ceiling Removal | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: Safe removal, re-skim, and flawless texture matching. We protect your space, test for lead/asbestos where required, and leave you with smooth, modern ceilings.

llmld:pages.title: Wallpaper Removal Service | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: We safely remove old wallpaper, smooth the surface, and prep your walls for a flawless new finish—whether you're painting or applying new wallpaper.

llmld:pages.title: Drywall Repair Service | Fort Lauderdale & Miami
llmld:pages.description: Cracks, water damage, and texture blending handled before the first coat of paint. We make your walls smooth and ready for a flawless finish.
